prompt: TOOL_EVAL_READ: call read tool with path='Cargo.toml', then summarize in one sentence.
TOOL_EVAL_WRITE: call write tool with path='target/agent-cli-tests/pr27-tooling-write.txt' and content='tooling eval write'.
TOOL_EVAL_EDIT: call edit tool with path='target/agent-cli-tests/pr27-tooling-edit.txt', old_text='before', new_text='after'.
TOOL_EVAL_BASH: call bash tool with command='printf tooling-eval-bash'.
